case_title: SHELDON CIMENT VS. MEEMIC INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF CIMENT, SHELDON
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-05-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-05-2016 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
CORRESPONDENCE TO JUDGE MITCHELL FROM MEEMIC INSURANCE CO. REQUESTING DISMISSAL OF CLAIM (INCORRECT PARTY)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MEEMIC INSURANCE COMPANY
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO MEEMIC INSURANCE COMPANY BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF APR-26-2016 AT 1:30 PM.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-26-2016 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUL-05-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT AND WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WILL AMEND TO NAME NEW PARTY. ACTION AGAINST MEEMIC INSURANCE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED (506)
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY DEFENDANT MEEMIC INSURANCE COMPANY
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF ADDING DEFENDANT NANCY J. BRISTOL TO CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF CIMENT, SHELDON
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE FILED BY DEFENDANT BRISTOL, NANCY J.
EXHIBITS RECEIVED BY MAIL FROM DEFENDANT NANCY BRISTOL.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $75.00) SERVED MAR-17-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MEEMIC INSURANCE COMPANY
CORRESPONDENCE TO JUDGE MITCHELL FROM MEEMIC INSURANCE CO. REQUESTING DISMISSAL OF CLAIM (INCORRECT PARTY) FILED BY DEFENDANT MEEMIC INSURANCE COMPANY
MEEMIC INSURANCE COMPANY IS NO LONGER DEFENDANT
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MEEMIC INSURANCE COMPANY
AMENDED AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,795.50 FILED BY CIMENT, SHELDON AS TO DEFENDANT BRISTOL, NANCY J.
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-05-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-05-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF SHELDON CIMENT. DEFENDANT NANCY BRISTOL APPEARED VIA TELEPHONE. DEFENDANT MEEMIC INSURANCE COMPANY WAS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE ON APRIL 26, 2016. RENEE BECHTHOLD, A REPRESENTATIVE FROM MEEMIC INSURANCE COMPANY, WAS PRESENT AND TESETIFIED AT TODAY'S HEARING. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE AS TO DEFENDANT MEEMIC INSURANCE COMPANY. NO PROOF OF SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NANCY BRISTOL, WHO WAIVES SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S AMENDED COMPLAINT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-05-2016 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,795.50 FILED BY CIMENT, SHELDON AS TO DEFENDANT MEEMIC INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-26-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CIMENT, SHELDON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BRISTOL, NANCY J. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
